title: Privacy & Recording Settings
lede: Control what your Smart Agent keeps: turn call transcript and recording storage on or off, and choose whether to save the call audio.

steps.title: Open Privacy & Recording
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open your agent.
  2. Click Settings, then select the Privacy & Recording section in the left rail.

images.caption: Privacy & Recording is a section inside the agent Settings panel.
Privacy & Recording is a section inside the agent Settings panel.

steps.title: Choose Whether to Store Sensitive Data
steps.content:
• Disable Sensitive Data Storage: when on, iMash will not store or log the call transcript or recording for this agent.
  • Leave it off if you want transcripts saved for later review and analysis.

images.caption: Privacy choices apply to every call this agent handles.
Privacy choices apply to every call this agent handles.

steps.title: Turn Audio Recording On or Off
steps.content:
• Use the Audio Recording toggle to record (or not record) the conversation audio.
  • This option is only available while sensitive-data storage is enabled - if you disable storage, recording is turned off too.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: With privacy set, continue configuring your agent:

cards.title: Agent Settings
cards.description: Adjust timeouts, idle messages, and voicemail handling.

cards.title: Post-Call Processing
cards.description: Extract structured data and send call results to your systems.

cards.title: Review Call Logs
cards.description: See stored transcripts, recordings, and call summaries.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials

metaDescription: Control your iMash Smart Agent's data privacy: turn transcript and recording storage on or off with Disable Sensitive Data Storage, and toggle audio recording.
metaKeywords: privacy settings, imash, smart agent, data storage, audio recording, transcript, sensitive data
